title: Tools, Resources, Prompts, and Server Instructions
description: Design a minimal MCP surface for an internal knowledge and action service. Learners cumulatively produce an MCP primitive and naming contract through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Expose actions as narrow tools with descriptive schemas and side-effect annotations.
Expose readable addressable context as resources or templates rather than action tools.
Expose reusable user-controlled prompt templates only when they improve discovery and composition.
